chart.$description:
Chart plot geometry. Script-readable: JS arithmetic must consume these
to produce an SVG position, and no CSS expression can compute a y attribute
from a data value. They are emitted to both targets — the custom property and
the per-layer JS module — so they still appear in the Overview. Accepted cost:
a value bound at import time cannot re-densify, so chart geometry does not
respond to .arena-compact. It never did.

pad-top.$description:
Equals --sp-2. Authored rather than aliased: build-tokens.mjs loads one
source file per call, so a DTCG reference across files would not resolve.

pad-bottom.$description:
Holds the category labels. This is a CONSEQUENCE of the type scale, not a
chosen dimension: it is enough room for a label at --dz-text-2xs. If the type
scale moves, revisit it — it will not fail loudly.

pad-left.$description: Holds the value labels. A consequence of the type scale, like pad-bottom.

bar-radius.$description:
A bar's data end. Deliberately NOT --r-sm (6px): naming the value Arena
already renders is free, snapping to the radius scale is a visible 2px design
change and must be taken as one.

point-r.$description: A line chart's point at rest.

point-r-hover.$description:
A line chart's point under the pointer. The 1px delta IS the hover
affordance — the pair only means anything together.

legend-gap.$description: Between the doughnut plot and its legend. Equals --sp-4.
